rows.text::my_ms: Fasilitator lain sedang menghantar laporan 📝. Hantar laporan anda sekarang!
rows.text: Others in the programme are submitting reports 📝. Submit yours now!

text.eng: Others in the programme are submitting reports 📝. Submit yours now!

rows.title: @global.app_name

rows.text::my_ms: Ramai fasilitator sudah selesai menghantar laporan ✅. Masa untuk hantar laporan anda!
rows.text: Most facilitators are done ✅. Submit your report today!

text.eng: Most facilitators are done ✅. Submit your report today!

rows.title: @global.app_name

rows.text::my_ms: Banyak laporan sedang diterima 💬. Kongsi laporan anda sekarang!
rows.text: Reports are coming in 💬. Share your report now!

text.eng: Reports are coming in 💬. Share your report now!

rows.title: @global.app_name

rows.text::my_ms: Sertai fasilitator lain 🧡. Hantar laporan anda untuk kekal ikut jadual!
rows.text: Join other facilitators 🧡. Submit your report to stay on track!

text.eng: Join other facilitators 🧡. Submit your report to stay on track!

rows.title: @global.app_name

rows.text::my_ms: Tinggal satu langkah lagi 🏁. Hantar laporan anda untuk habiskan dengan baik!
rows.text: Just one step left 🏁. Submit your report to finish strong!

text.eng: Just one step left 🏁. Submit your report to finish strong!

rows.title: @global.app_name

rows.text::my_ms: Langkah terakhir 💪. Selesaikan dengan menghantar laporan hari ini!
rows.text: Final step 💪. Wrap up by sending your report today!

text.eng: Final step 💪. Wrap up by sending your report today!

rows.title: @global.app_name

rows.text::my_ms: Tinggal sedikit lagi 📋. Hantar laporan untuk lengkapkan sesi anda!
rows.text: So close 📋. Send your report and complete your session!

text.eng: So close 📋. Send your report and complete your session!

rows.title: @global.app_name

rows.text::my_ms: Anda hampir siap ✨. Hantar sahaja laporan anda!
rows.text: You’re nearly done ✨. Just send in your report!

text.eng: You’re nearly done ✨. Just send in your report!

rows.title: @global.app_name

rows.text::my_ms: Fasilitator yang lain sedang maju ke hadapan 💬. Mulakan sesi chat anda hari ini!
rows.text: Others are moving forward 💬. Start your next chat session today!

text.eng: Others are moving forward 💬. Start your next chat session today!

rows.title: @global.app_name

rows.text::my_ms: Ramai fasilitator sudah mulakan chat seterusnya ✅. Teruskan sesi anda!
rows.text: Most facilitators have begun their next chat ✅. Pick up where you left off!

text.eng: Most facilitators have begun their next chat ✅. Pick up where you left off!

rows.title: @global.app_name

rows.text::my_ms: Fasilitator lain sedang ikut jadual 📈. Jom mulakan sesi baru!
rows.text: Facilitators are staying on track 📈. Begin your next session now!

text.eng: Facilitators are staying on track 📈. Begin your next session now!

rows.title: @global.app_name

rows.text::my_ms: Ramai fasilitator lain sedang aktif dengan chat 💬. Sertai fasilitator lain dan mulakan sesi anda!
rows.text: Many facilitators are continuing their chats 💬. Join in and start your next one!

text.eng: Many facilitators are continuing their chats 💬. Join in and start your next one!

rows.title: @global.app_name

rows.text::my_ms: Kemajuan anda sangat baik 💬. Jom sambung sesi berikutnya!
rows.text: You’re building strong progress 💬. Continue by starting your next session!

text.eng: You’re building strong progress 💬. Continue by starting your next session!

rows.title: @global.app_name

rows.text::my_ms: Setiap sesi saling melengkapkan dengan sesi yang lain ✨. Jom teruskan sekarang!
rows.text: Each session builds on the last ✨. Keep it going—start your next one now!

text.eng: Each session builds on the last ✨. Keep it going—start your next one now!

rows.title: @global.app_name

rows.text::my_ms: Anda memang hebat 💪. Teruskan dengan mulakan sesi baru!
rows.text: Great progress so far 💪. You’re getting closer—begin your next session today!

text.eng: Great progress so far 💪. You’re getting closer—begin your next session today!

rows.title: @global.app_name

rows.text::my_ms: Selangkah lagi ke garisan penamat 🏁. Mulakan sesi chat seterusnya hari ini!
rows.text: One step closer to the finish line 🏁. Begin your next chat session today!

text.eng: One step closer to the finish line 🏁. Begin your next chat session today!

rows.title: @global.app_name
